title: submitpackage RPC
description: Bitcoin Core's submitpackage RPC submits a topologically ordered package of raw transactions to the local mempool for consensus and package-policy evaluation; local acceptance does not imply network propagation.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 submitpackage RPC
resources.notes: Current RPC reference for submitting packages, interpreting admission results, and understanding the local-only propagation boundary.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Package Mempool Acceptance Policy
resources.notes: Canonical package topology, limits, fee-rate, replacement, and submission-policy rules.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core 26.0 Release Notes
resources.notes: Historical introduction of submitpackage and its package-CPFP use case before package relay support.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for RPC workflows, mempool admission, transaction packages, and fee-bumping behavior.
